title: Chomutov, Ústí nad Labem — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chomutov, Ústí nad Labem: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chomutov is a city in Ústí nad Labem with a population of 47,000. A North Bohemian city at the foot of the Ore Mountains, featuring a historic old town and the popular Kamencové jezero lake for recreation.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
